features: ❥Package Includes:2 pieces bowknot hair clips,these boutique bow hairpins will add glamour to your everyday look.The hair clip is made of the alloy,very strong,easy to use and durable.

❥Perfect Size: approx. 5 x5.3cm,material:polyester ,the bow is very beautiful. The hair clip behind the bow can hold just the right hair. The hair will not be tangled or pulled when the hair clip is removed. To wear for a long time,will not make uncomfortable.

❥Various Occasions:This lovely bow hair clip is portable and lightweight so you can enjoy it anytime and anywhere. It is multi-functional and you can also use it for entertainment purposes or to help you in washing and makeup.Perfect for special events and photo shoots,everyday wear,holidays etc.
❥Perfect Gift:These cute hair clips are perfect gifts for friends,family,and classmates. It is also an ideal gift for girls on birthday,Thanksgiving,and Christmas gifts for girlfriends and ladies.
❥Customer Service:Any issue with this hair clips,please feel free to contact us.We will do our best to provide you with a fast and pleasant shopping experience.Now buy them with confidence.
